Title: (2 pack) Pen+Gear Business Operating Hours Sign, 8"x12" - Complete with Numbers,  Red & White
Description: Pen+Gear Open Hours Sign – A perfect blend of style and functionality, designed to enhance your store’s appearance while clearly displaying your operating hours. Made with durable silk screen printing, this sign resists fading even under direct sunlight. Customizable stickers are included for a clean and professional look. Quick and easy to assemble—set up in just 5 minutes. Effortlessly adheres to windows or any smooth surface, ensuring your business hours are communicated clearly and attractively.
